// Country flag emojis and metadata for major displacement situations

  'MMR': '🇲🇲', 'COD': '🇨🇩', 'SOM': '🇸🇴', 'SSD': '🇸🇸',
  'VEN': '🇻🇪', 'ERI': '🇪🇷', 'BDI': '🇧🇮', 'CAF': '🇨🇫',
  'IRQ': '🇮🇶', 'NGA': '🇳🇬', 'YEM': '🇾🇪', 'COL': '🇨🇴',
  'ETH': '🇪🇹', 'MOZ': '🇲🇿', 'MLI': '🇲🇱', 'BFA': '🇧🇫',
  'TUR': '🇹🇷', 'IRN': '🇮🇷', 'PAK': '🇵🇰', 'DEU': '🇩🇪',
  'UGA': '🇺🇬', 'POL': '🇵🇱', 'KEN': '🇰🇪', 'TCD': '🇹🇩',
  'BGD': '🇧🇩', 'EGY': '🇪🇬', 'JOR': '🇯🇴', 'LBN': '🇱🇧',
  'RUS': '🇷🇺', 'FRA': '🇫🇷', 'ESP': '🇪🇸', 'USA': '🇺🇸',
  'GBR': '🇬🇧', 'BRA': '🇧🇷', 'PER': '🇵🇪', 'CHL': '🇨🇱',
  'TZA': '🇹🇿', 'RWA': '🇷🇼', 'CMR': '🇨🇲', 'NER': '🇳🇪',
  'ZAF': '🇿🇦', 'IND': '🇮🇳', 'MYS': '🇲🇾', 'THA': '🇹🇭',
  'IDN': '🇮🇩', 'AUS': '🇦🇺', 'CAN': '🇨🇦', 'ITA': '🇮🇹',
  'GRC': '🇬🇷', 'SWE': '🇸🇪', 'AUT': '🇦🇹', 'HUN': '🇭🇺',
  'ROU': '🇷🇴', 'CZE': '🇨🇿', 'NLD': '🇳🇱', 'BEL': '🇧🇪',
  'CHN': '🇨🇳', 'HTI': '🇭🇹', 'PSE': '🇵🇸', 'LBY': '🇱🇾',
  'CUB': '🇨🇺', 'HND': '🇭🇳', 'GTM': '🇬🇹', 'SLV': '🇸🇻',
  'NIC': '🇳🇮', 'MEX': '🇲🇽', 'PHL': '🇵🇭',
};

// Map UNHCR codes to ISO codes for common mismatches
export const UNHCR_TO_ISO: Record<string, string> = {
  'SYR': 'SYR', 'UKR': 'UKR', 'AFG': 'AFG', 'SUD': 'SDN',
  'MYA': 'MMR', 'DRC': 'COD', 'SOM': 'SOM', 'SSD': 'SSD',
  'IRA': 'IRN', 'GFR': 'DEU', 'AUL': 'AUS', 'IRQ': 'IRQ',
  'VEN': 'VEN', 'ERI': 'ERI', 'BDI': 'BDI', 'CAR': 'CAF',
  'NIG': 'NGA', 'YEM': 'YEM', 'COL': 'COL', 'ETH': 'ETH',
  'MOZ': 'MOZ', 'MLI': 'MLI', 'BUF': 'BFA', 'TUR': 'TUR',
  'PAK': 'PAK', 'UGA': 'UGA', 'POL': 'POL', 'KEN': 'KEN',
  'CHA': 'TCD', 'BAG': 'BGD', 'EGY': 'EGY', 'JOR': 'JOR',
  'LEB': 'LBN', 'RUS': 'RUS',
};

export const MAJOR_SITUATIONS = [
  { code: 'SYR', name: 'Syria' },
  { code: 'UKR', name: 'Ukraine' },
  { code: 'AFG', name: 'Afghanistan' },
  { code: 'SDN', name: 'Sudan' },
  { code: 'MMR', name: 'Myanmar' },
  { code: 'COD', name: 'DR Congo' },
  { code: 'SOM', name: 'Somalia' },
  { code: 'SSD', name: 'South Sudan' },
];

export function getFlag(code: string): string {
  const iso = UNHCR_TO_ISO[code] || code;
  return COUNTRY_FLAGS[iso] || COUNTRY_FLAGS[code] || '🏳️';
}

export function getCleanName(name: string): string {
  // Clean up API country names
  return name
    .replace('Syrian Arab Rep.', 'Syria')
    .replace('Dem. Rep. of the Congo', 'DR Congo')
    .replace("Dem. People's Rep. of Korea", 'North Korea')
    .replace('Iran (Islamic Rep. of)', 'Iran')
    .replace('Lao People\'s Dem. Rep.', 'Laos')
    .replace('Rep. of Korea', 'South Korea')
    .replace('Türkiye', 'Türkiye')
    .replace('Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of)', 'Venezuela')
    .replace('United Rep. of Tanzania', 'Tanzania')
    .replace('Central African Rep.', 'Central African Rep.')
    .replace('Rep. of Moldova', 'Moldova')
    .replace('Viet Nam', 'Vietnam')
    .replace('Rep. of the Congo', 'Congo')
    .replace('Côte d\'Ivoire', 'Côte d\'Ivoire')
    .replace('State of Palestine', 'Palestine');
}
